brief.title: Pre-Mission Brief
briefParagraphs: VOSS. Not org-chart theater for its own sake — this is their published flow. Each artifact either feeds a gate or it doesn't. Mis-link and we're proving their chaos, not our rigor.

NOVA. Mission 03 was audience — who may see the truth. This is process — where that truth enters their machine. Handoff detection starts at 0%. Wrong gate, wrong timeline story — exposure climbs and I'll say why.
ZEX. Eight files on the rail, eight icons on the flow spine — click each gate, match headers to Expects, drag before the "random dump" headline sets.
brief.pullquote: Link the spine. Beat the random-dump headline.

dossier.label: TARGET

protocol.title: Mission Protocol

steps.title: INSPECT THE STEP
steps.description: Click any step icon on the onboarding flow — its purpose, inputs, outputs, and bottleneck appear on the canvas. Each dataset card lists its table headers as a clue.

steps.title: DRAG TO THE OPEN STEP
steps.description: Steps unlock in order — locked icons show a 🔒, available ones pulse cyan. Drag the right dataset onto the active step; a correct drop draws a green arrow to the next stage.

steps.title: DETECTION
steps.description: Wrong drop — Nova explains, detection rises, the meter does not heal. At 100% the audit trips. Right drop locks that step and unlocks the next. Complete all eight to finalize the onboarding map.

protocol.atlasNote: Mission 03 trained who may see the data. Mission 04 is when each department takes custody along one regulated case.

detection.title: HANDOFF DETECTION METER
paragraphs: Mission 03 trained who may see the data. Mission 04 is when each department takes custody along one regulated case — proving the package isn't a random pile.
Every wrong drop raises detection; the meter doesn't heal. At 100% you're exposed. Complete all eight handoffs with the spine intact.

pills.text: Correct drop · green arrow unlocks next

detection.hint: Stuck? Line up each step's Expects line with the dataset table headers in the rail.

game.placeholderBody: OMNI onboarding flow map with dataset handoffs.
